name: avatar/snapshot
description: Capture a Bevy 3D avatar snapshot as PNG for profile pictures. Allocates a temporary render slot, loads the persona's VRM model, waits for a clean frame, encodes as PNG, and saves to ~/.continuum/avatars/. Cached on disk — subsequent calls return immediately unless force=true.

params.name: identity
params.description: Persona identity string (e.g., 'helper', 'teacher'). Used to select avatar model and name the output file.

params.name: force
params.description: Force re-capture even if cached snapshot exists (default: false)

results.name: path
results.description: Relative URL path to the avatar PNG (e.g., '/avatars/helper.png')

results.name: cached
results.description: Whether the result came from disk cache (true) or was freshly captured (false)
